runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.25) when seventh over 410m at Horsham in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turning into home straight.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last in a Other on April 9 over 305m at this track behind Rocket Susie beaten 10 lengths (18.42). Placed two back at this track. Was in the money two on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by half a length in 17.78, beating Lap To Burn. Last start finished 4th on April 8 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Adhana Layla beaten 1.75 lengths (17.42) in a Grade 6. Happy to risk in this.
